description: Find the main symmetric colored object and output its upper-left 3x3 corner. Colors are copied directly.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_2013d3e2(I):
    x1 = objects(I, F, T, T)
    x2 = first(x1)
    x3 = subgrid(x2, I)
    x4 = lefthalf(x3)
    O = tophalf(x4)
    return O
